analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Tech issue\n\nBody: Hi Asmita,  I am still getting Zoca notifications?  Can you please reshare how to completely disconnect Zoca from my Google listing?  Thanks,  Caryn

messages.body: Subject: Tech issue\n\nBody: Hi Asmita,  I am still getting Zoca notifications?  Can you please reshare how to completely disconnect Zoca from my Google listing?  Thanks,  Caryn
Her are the exact steps :
Sure Caryn, let me share exact steps with you. Incase we are not successful with that, we can hop a on a quick video meeting tomorrow and get this sorted.

Hi Caryn, I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to let you know that we have offboarded you from Zoca and removed the landing page. Additionally, we have processed a refund for the December charges. I sincerely apologize fo…
Log into Google?
There is no people tab. I would like some assistance to make sure you guys don\'t have access to anything tied to my company, please
Not really. You should just log in once using your owner email and look at the “people tab” and confirm Zoca doesn’t have manager access for your GBP.
Her are the exact steps :
Thank you for the update. Is there anything I need to do as far as your access in my Google profile?

I have also requested a custom report for you that should highlight your entire journey with Zoca (in terms of data point and growth). Once ready, I will email it to you first thing and notify you here.
Can you explain the off boarding process to me because it’s my understanding that my payment on December 30 was for the month of January

As I was notified by marketing team last month (around 4th of December) - Google shares data at a lag of 7 days. Once we have December data of Google - the reports are built and made live for users on the apps

Also, your account is aligned for January cancellation. The off-boarding is set to happen on 15th of January. If you would like to remove the landing page before that - just let me know and I will get that unlinked from …
I do wanna know how long my landing page was down the last time it happened so I would like that data ASAP please because I believe it was close to a week if not longer

The gaslighting and lying just continues. This has been an issue for the last six months and I’ve called you out on it when we’ve had in person meetings. I’m happy to get on a meeting with you, but you’re just gonna hear…
Today today’s January 4, which is exactly what happened last month when I messaged you and the report for December still not available hence not being able to cancel at a 30 day mark

You can keep my $200. It’s not that much money to me but the fact that you guys won’t do it for customer service with all we’ve been through in all of the hiccups and glitches speaks to what your company is about. I do w…
It’s a bit of a scheme at this point because of this
Google analytics are current all the way to yesterday
Hi Caryn, I truly understand your frustration regarding the December charge and the lack of data visibility on the app.

Asmita, the Google sheet is useless. I could’ve done it myself quick quicker and had access to edit it. It tells me nothing. I’ve asked you over and over and over again for probably at least three months to show me real …
I do believe it’s fair of me to ask for the money back as we’ve had this conversation for over 30 days now that I’m not happy and I haven’t been happy for a long time and you know that

The request for refund is  already made as you had requested on 1st of January.  I am waiting for hear back on this. The internal team comes back to office tomorrow so I should be able to give you a final confirmation by…

I was looking to find your Google page to write my experience and you guys don’t even have a Google listing for your website?? To offer your services that’s very unsettling. I did find some reviews though and they’re not…
I guess the fact that I’ve been requesting data from you for over three months is irrelevant to a $200 refund

Hi Caryn, I hope you're doing well. I understand your frustration regarding the December charge but please refer to the above screenshot I have shared.   While we spoke of dissatisfaction and cancellation early December …

We have a way of accessing the log for landing page. Let me ask my internal team to get those records. If I recall correctly- it was only down for some hours but let us go ahead and verify it either way.

It was actually December 2 when my reports wouldn’t populate again and I think you guys should be giving me two days of grace consider considering my landing page was down for about a week the month prior

If you go through all of our conversations, you basically told me I wouldn’t incur any further charges as we spoke all through the month of December, which led me to believe I was canceled after my last billing cycle not…

I’ve been asking for canceling this service for over a month. I haven’t been happy for months. The landing page goes up and down and I still pay monthly fee fees. I want a refund for today’s charge and I want to be done …

Hi Caryn, I hope you are well.   You mentioned cancellation on December 6th for the first time and specially asked to be not charged starting January - the new year. (This particular conversation is on this appchat itsel…

Your invoice is generated on the 30th of every month for that particular month and hence the December money was deducted yesterday. Please let us know if there's anything else we can help you with. Rest assured, we have …
We still have time until mid January so would really appreciate the opportunity to connect on a meeting with you - if you have the availability in January.

Caryn, the Local SEO is what putting our Google profile at the top and attracting these new clients - the numbers I have shared above. I do believe it's working really well for us. We just probably at this point track if…
Also, December charges will come through but I had already kept management in loop regarding cancellation in January but I really wish you continue.

I use Google sheets all the time so I don’t know why I can’t edit or make changes either way. I’ve been trying to get this data for over a month and I still don’t have it. I do want to be canceled as per our conversation…
